evals.prompt: The category namespace in Python still has inline description strings in __init__.py instead of using prompt constants from a prompts.py file. Fix it to match the TypeScript pattern.
evals.expected_output: Creates python/commerce_mcp/tools/category/prompts.py with READ_CATEGORY_PROMPT, CREATE_CATEGORY_PROMPT, UPDATE_CATEGORY_PROMPT constants sourced from typescript/src/shared/category/prompts.ts, and updates __init__.py to import and use them.

evals.prompt: Sync prompts for the products namespace — the Python __init__.py has one-liner descriptions but TypeScript has a full prompts.ts.
evals.expected_output: Creates python/commerce_mcp/tools/products/prompts.py with LIST_PRODUCTS_PROMPT (or similar), CREATE_PRODUCTS_PROMPT, UPDATE_PRODUCTS_PROMPT from typescript/src/shared/products/prompts.ts, and updates __init__.py.

evals.prompt: Port prompts to Python for the carts namespace.
evals.expected_output: Correctly maps Python 'carts' → TypeScript 'cart', creates prompts.py from typescript/src/shared/cart/prompts.ts, updates __init__.py.
